stream_samples.text: robinhood market order at 9:30:02 EST executed at 9:30:41. NBBO moved 1.4% in those 39 seconds. routing to which venue exactly?
Sold a covered call that expired ITM Friday. Cash settlement didn't post until Tuesday mid-day. Couldn't redeploy the buying power for 2 sessions.
[#RH-19920 P1] 1099-B for 2025 still not generated 9 weeks after year-end. User cannot file taxes. Third escalation.
tried to whitelist a BTC withdrawal address, app crashed on the QR scan step. iOS 18.3, iPhone 14 Pro. Repeatable.
Market-open execution quality regressed — fill-vs-NBBO slippage p95 up 38bps in the first 60s of the open. Routing weights to MEMX vs Citadel changed Friday?
robinhood gold downgrade to free "in progress" for 6 days. Still being charged the $5 fee. customer service told me to wait "another billing cycle".
Maxed out my Roth IRA and got NO warning at the $7000 cap. Now I have an excess contribution to fix. The app should literally just block this.
[#ORDER-5512] options assignment notice arrived 14 hours after market close on expiration Friday. User missed the window to react premarket Monday.
When does the 1099-DIV typically get released? Last year it was Feb 10, this year I still don't have it April 26.
the new instant deposit limits for gold members are great, $50k same-day actually clears in seconds now
Tax-doc gen pipeline failed for ~14k accounts with multi-broker transfers — corp action reconciliation step throws on partial-share splits. Backfill ETA TBD.
Crypto withdrawal whitelist 24h timer reset every time I edited the label. Effectively can never withdraw to a new address. Insane UX.
[order-router] open-auction routing weights drifted after Friday's config push — MEMX share dropped 22pp, slippage on MOO orders up materially.
User couldn't downgrade Gold via app — toggle reverts after restart. Web works. iOS-only regression since v2024.16.

Crypto withdrawal whitelist 24h timer reset bug
IRA contribution limit warnings missing in-app

top_epic.title: Restore market-open execution quality on order routing
top_epic.rationale: 1,980 signals — including direct fills traders can timestamp and screenshot — point at a Friday config push that drifted open-auction routing weights. Internal telemetry confirms: fill-vs-NBBO slippage p95 up 38bps in the first 60s of the open, MEMX share dropped 22pp, and MOO slippage moved materially. Execution quality is the brokerage's load-bearing trust signal — every basis point of slippage at the open is visible to the most sophisticated cohort and ends up on r/options within an hour.
top_epic.verdict: Trust-critical — execution quality is the table-stakes contract.
top_epic.recommendation: Roll back the Friday router config, gate future router changes behind a TCA-replay shadow eval, and surface daily NBBO-slippage SLOs to the on-call rotation.
acceptance_criteria: Open-auction routing weights restored to pre-Friday baseline; MEMX share within 5pp of historical mean
Fill-vs-NBBO slippage p95 in first 60s of open returns to under 8bps across the top 200 tickers
TCA-replay shadow eval gates every order-router config change in CI; regressions > 3bps block merge
Daily NBBO-slippage SLO dashboard wired into on-call paging with a 15bps p95 threshold

evidence.quote: Market-open execution quality regressed — fill-vs-NBBO slippage p95 up 38bps in the first 60s of the open.
open-auction routing weights drifted after Friday's config push — MEMX share dropped 22pp.
Market order at 9:30:02 executed at 9:30:41. NBBO moved 1.4% in those 39 seconds.
